_comment: Sequential Execution Strategy - Execute agents one at a time in strict order
description: Sequential execution ensures strict ordering. Each agent completes before the next begins.
use_cases: Workflows where each step depends on the previous
disadvantages: Higher latency (sum of all agent times)

wait_for_completion.description: Wait for each agent to complete before starting next

fail_fast.description: Stop execution immediately on first error

preserve_order.description: Maintain strict ordering even if agents could run in parallel

timeout_per_agent.description: Timeout in seconds for each agent execution

continue_on_error.description: Continue to next agent even if current agent fails
